nasb.text: As for the people, he removed them to the cities from one end of Egypt’s border to the other.

esv.text: As for the people, he made servants of them from one end of Egypt to the other.

cnv.text: 至於人民，約瑟使他們作奴僕，從埃及境內的一端，直到另一端。

ccb.text: 约瑟使埃及全境的人都成为法老的奴仆。

csbs.text: 至于埃及边界一端到另一端的所有百姓，约瑟都使他们成了奴隶。
